title: Sketch one impossible feature
prompt: Write a tiny concept note for a weird feature you would never usually green-light.

title: Polish one rough edge
prompt: Pick one friction point and make the interaction feel 20% smoother.

title: Ship a tiny delight
prompt: Add one playful detail that gives the page personality without harming clarity.

title: Write a field note
prompt: Capture what changed today, what surprised you, and what to do next.

title: Design sprint seed
prompt: Draft a one-page direction for a future section, including visual tone and success signal.

title: Deep work block
prompt: Choose one meaningful feature and push it from concept to usable in one focused pass.

title: Cleanup loop
prompt: Delete dead UI, simplify labels, and trim one source of future confusion.

title: Data feed upgrade
prompt: Improve one content JSON feed so homepage cards feel more alive and informative.
